p: Welcome to the documentation! This documentation is not complete.
Feel free to scroll through all the pages!
What you can and cannot do.

By buying and using our products, you agree to follow these terms. Failure to abide by these terms may result in your licence being revoked or a blacklist being issued, based on the severity of the incident.
These terms apply to all products manufactured by Alvin Solutions and it's subsidiaries.

You agree not to bypass, interfere with, or attempt to circumvent the licensing systems implemented in our products. You also agree not to modify, alter, or tamper with any engine scripts without explicit authorization.

You agree not to remove or alter logos included on provided models, except where UI customization is permitted. You agree not to use the Alvin Solutions logo on any product not manufactured by Alvin Solutions.
You are free to create, sell, or distribute your own addons, models, or UI themes for our products. Customers may purchase and apply them at their discretion.
However, you must not include or repackage any Alvin Solutions assets (models, scripts, textures, UI elements, etc.) in your addons. Only your original or third-party assets are allowed.
Contact our support team via our Discord server and we'll be more than happy to resolve your issue.

Pursuant to Roblox's User and Creator Terms of Use, all purchases made with Robux are final, non-refundable, and non-reversible unless Roblox intervenes directly. Alvin Solutions, as the developer, is not authorized to process refunds for Robux purchases under any circumstances.
Check out our frequently asked questions, the answer you're looking for might already be here.
Visit the support page for the product you're having trouble with, or contact our support team via our Discord server.

l: Do licenses work in Communities I don't own?
p: No. For your products to work in games owned by Communities (formerly Groups), your account needs to be the owner.

l: How can I access my products?
p: You can purchase and download all of our products easily through our Discord

l: Can I purchase products without using Robux?
p: No. Support for paying with real money will come soon.

l: Why am I receiving an error saying HTTP Service is not enabled, even though it is?
p: This issue can occur for several reasons. Please review the following:
Verify that HTTP Requests are enabled in Home > Game Settings > Security, and ensure you clicked Save after enabling it.
HTTP requests do not work in local (unpublished) games. Publish your game to Roblox and restart Studio afterward.

Too many scripts may be making HTTP requests. Although our products are optimized to minimize HTTP usage, excessive requests from other scripts may exceed Roblox's limits. Our products will automatically retry after a short delay, but persistent overloads can cause startup failures. Identify and remove any scripts that may be overloading HTTP Service.

l: Why am I being kicked with the message "Alvin Solutions has detected you are using counterfeit products"?
p: You do not have the license of a product.
Play games that I made!
Tower Defense

Welcome to the main menu of JavaScript site tricks. In this documentation, you will to have dev tools. If you're on mobile, don't worry, there's another way. The dev tools method is working on iOS and tested. Here's how to do it:
Before getting started, insert the latest version of this product from our Discord into your game.
Insert AdBoard.rbxm into Roblox Studio.
You are free to move, rotate and scale the ad boards to your liking. You need to keep all models within the AdBoard model for the system to work.
Any misplaced models will not work, keeping them in their respective folders is required.
Head on over to the configuration to set its behavior!
Need your ads switch faster? Yes, we have that.
This page assumes the user has basic knowledge of the Roblox scripting language, Luau.

c:
local settings = {}
-- Configure your settings here!

settings.waitTime = 5 -- Wait how many seconds until next ad?

settings.adAssets = {
	"rbxassetid://84859048110942", -- Placeholder
	"rbxassetid://84859048110942", -- Placeholder
	-- Put your ad asset IDs here, in that format.
}

settings.powerButtonWhitelistUsers = {
	5639926516, -- Alvinofelephants
	-- Put userids of people that can click the power button
}

settings.powerButtonWhitelistGroups = {
	[0] = 0,
	-- Put groupids and the minimum rank they can be to use the power button here
}

function settings:allow(Player:Player)
	-- We will not provide support for modifying this function.
	for _, id in pairs(settings.powerButtonWhitelistUsers) do
		if Player.UserId == id then
			return true
		end
	end
	for group,rank in pairs(settings.powerButtonWhitelistGroups) do
		if Player:GetRankInGroupAsync(group) >= rank then
			return true
		end
	end
	return false
end


return settings

p: After waitTime, the ads will switch.
The asset ids of the image.
The users that are able to click the power button.
The groups and their minimum ranks that are able to click the power button.
Not working? Make sure you followed the syntax, or visit our FAQ Page for help, or contact Alvin Solutions Support via our Discord server for further assistance.
The check used to detect if the user is allowed to press the power button.
